titleStmt.title: SII 5.1000: original edition by H. Krishna Sastri
No. 1000. (A.R. No. 135 of 1896). ON THE EAST WALL OF THE CENTRAL SHRINE IN THE SAME TEMPLE.

revisionDesc.change: Further conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)
Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti śrī . pukaḻmātu viḷaṅkac cayamātu virumpa nilamakaḷ nilava malarmakaḷ puṇara Urimaiyiṟ ci
ṟan=ta maṇimuṭi cūṭi mīnavar nilaikeṭa villavar kulaitara Eṉai maṉnavar ririyaluṟ ṟiḻitarat tikkaṉaittu
n=ta ṉ cakkā naṭātti vicaiyāpiṣekam paṇṇi vīrasiṁhāsana ttup puvanamuḻutuṭaiyāḷoṭum
vīṟṟirun=ta ruḷiya kovirācakecarivanma rāna cakkaravarttikaḷ śrīkolottuṅka coḻatevarkku yāṇṭu 2 10 9 Ā
vatu jayaṅ koṇṭacoḻamaṇṭalattuk kaḷattūrkkoṭṭattut taniyūr śrīmaturān=ta kaccaturvve timaṅkalattu
ttiruveṇkāṭuṭaiyār koyilkāṇiuṭaiya kautamaṉ tiruveṇkāṭuṭaiyāṉpaṭṭanum pārattuvāci civakali
yāṇanum kāciyapaṉ piccatevapaṭṭanum Ikkuṭip poṉnampalakkūttanum Uḷḷiṭṭa śivabrāhma ṇarom śrī
māheśva rakkaṇkāṇi ceyvārkaḷukkuc cilālekai ceytu kuṭutta paricāvatu Immaṇṭalattu Ōymānāṭṭup
perāyūrnāṭṭu nakaram Ulokamā tevipurattu viyāpāri Ārvalaṅkiḻāṉ kampa n=ti ruvūṟal Ittiruveṇkāṭu
ṭaiyār koyilil Āṭiyaruḷuvāṟku vaitta tirunun=tā viḷakku 1 Oṉṟukkum Ivaṉ viṭṭa Āṭu 9 10 Ittoṇṇū
ṟum cāvā mūvāp perāṭāka Icain tu Eṅkaḷ paṅkopāti kaikkoṇṭu Ittirunun=tā viḷakku Oṉṟum Erikkakkaṭavārākavum
Ikkoyilkāṇi koṇṭārum Aṭaikoṇṭārum strīdha nam peṟṟārum Ikkoyil tiṟan tu muṟai ceytāre Ittiru
nun=tā viḷakku Oṉṟum can=ti rātittavaṟ Erikkakkaṭavomāka Ivvāṭu toṇṇūṟuṅ kaikkoṇṭu cilālekai
ceytu kuṭuttom Ikkoyiṟ śivabrāhmaṇarom panmāheśvara rakṣai ...
Digital edition of SII 5.1000 by converted to DHARMA conventions by Renato Dávalos.
